repair_candidate.pr_body:
Clownfish repair for #89628.

This repair keeps @yyzquwu's contributor branch as the source path, preserves attribution, resolves the live rebase/conflict blocker reported by ClawSweeper, and refreshes proof on the repaired head.

Validation plan:
- pnpm -s vitest run src/cli/run-main.test.ts src/entry.test.ts test/openclaw-launcher.e2e.test.ts test/scripts/bench-cli-startup.test.ts test/scripts/check-cli-startup-memory.test.ts test/scripts/write-cli-startup-metadata.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed

After validation, request a fresh ClawSweeper review for the exact repaired head. This worker result does not merge or close anything.
